runtime_matrix.notes: Primary release smoke baseline for the bundled demo stack.
Manual runtime check for the declared PHP minimum when the official image is available.

stresses.tax: EU VAT calculated from the shipping destination with prices including tax.
stresses.shipping: Taxable flat-rate tracked parcel shipping for Germany and nearby EU countries.
stresses.stock: Managed stock with soft quote stock holds and checkout-time stock revalidation.
stresses.plugins: WooCommerce latest stable plus the AgentCart ShopBridge plugin with no extra merchant policy plugins.
stresses.checkout: Quote-bound AgentCart checkout using the exposed tea SKU and standard sandbox approval flow.

merchant_variance_profiles.name: Restricted stock and policy edge shop

stresses.tax: Same EU VAT rules as the baseline while product policies narrow the eligible checkout set.
stresses.shipping: Product-level country restrictions layered on top of the taxable tracked parcel zone.
stresses.stock: Low managed stock, per-product max quantity limits, and soft stock holds during quote and checkout.
stresses.plugins: WooCommerce latest stable plus ShopBridge product exposure, restricted-goods, and aftercare metadata.
stresses.checkout: Happy-path checkout remains available for a capped tea SKU while blocked and restricted SKUs stay ineligible.

release_claims: Plugin metadata and readme declare WordPress 6.4+ and PHP 8.1+.
The required runtime smoke uses latest WordPress, latest stable WooCommerce, and PHP 8.2.
PHP 8.1 compatibility is statically gated through PHPCompatibilityWP and can be runtime-smoked with the optional matrix entry.
External beta requires two WooCommerce merchant variance smoke profiles: baseline EU tax/shipping and restricted stock/policy.
